text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the race of the century: the Emperor vs the
Beast. Speculation is rampant as to who will come
out on top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The competitors themselves are no exception.
Sparks fly as they size each other up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Will the Emperor triumph or will the Beast devour
her whole? The crowd goes wild as the race
begins!
